flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Jackson College fell 100% between 2020 and 2023 (100.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jackson College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jackson College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Jackson College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 3.4k).
